name: PerformanceMetric
description: PerformanceMetric schema from Palo Alto Networks Autonomous DEM API

timestamp.description: Time bucket for the aggregated metric.

app_id.description: Application identifier if metric is application-specific.

value.description: Metric value in the appropriate unit for the metric type.

unit.description: Unit of measurement (e.g., ms, pct, Mbps).

segment.description: Network segment this metric applies to.

sample_count.description: Number of measurement samples in this time bucket.
